title: SUS
description: ※The SUS resource pack is a meme resource pack that replaces all of the textures and sounds in Minecraft with things that are related to the word "SUS". This includes the blocks, items, mobs, and even the music.
body:
※The SUS resource pack is a meme resource pack that replaces all of the textures and sounds in 
   Minecraft with things that are related to the word "SUS". This includes the blocks, items, mobs, and even 
   the music. The pack is meant to be funny and to make Minecraft a more "SUS" experience.

※Here are some examples of what the SUS resource pack changes:

     ●The grass block is replaced with a face of the Among Us imposter.
     ●The sun is replaced with a picture of a The Rock.
     ●The music is replaced with the Among Us theme song.

※The SUS resource pack is available for free. It is compatible with the Java edition of Minecraft.

※Here are some other things to note about the SUS resource pack:

    ●The pack is not intended to be taken seriously. It is just a fun way to add some humor to Minecraft.
    ●The pack may not work with all mods.
    ●The pack may not be compatible with all versions of Minecraft.

※If you are looking for a way to make Minecraft more "SUS", then the SUS resource pack is a good option.




                                                                          (●'◡'●)








Enjoy!.
